title: Lithic Coins
description: A mod to add coins to the tfc server lithic
body:
This mod aims too add coins to the terrafirmacraft focused server Lithic

it adds 25 different coins made from all sorts of different metals. As well as a system that saves the creation date and location of the coin onto the coin as an anti counterfiet mesure.



Although this mod was made for the lithic smp you don't need to be on the server to use the mod

[Join the lithic smp here](https://discord.gg/RShHYWqfKk)
